{{Quote|Shelkonwa's a big planet.|[[Joak Quiller]]|<ref name="Allegiance" />}}
'''Shelkonwa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].

==Description==
Shelkonwa was the capital planet of Shelsha sector. Its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] was [[Makrin City]] that contained [[Shelkonwa governor's palace]]. The planet had three [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]], including [[Makrin Main Spaceport]] and [[Greencliff Regional Spaceport]].<ref name="Allegiance" />

==History==
Shelkonwa joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the [[Indecta Era]]. During the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], it supported [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]].<ref name="TEGtW" />

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] traveled to Makrin City in order to negotiate the support of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Barshnis Choard]]'s plot to declare the independence of Shelsha sector. Choard was eventually [[Skirmish on Shelkonwa|betrayed]] by his [[Chief Administrator/Legends|Chief Administrator]], [[Vilim Disra]] who asked the assistance of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Leia Organa managed to escape the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] but Governor Choard was arrested by [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] and the [[Hand of Judgment]].<ref name="Allegiance" />
